SELECT * FROM role r LEFT JOIN role_screen_map rm ON rm.id_role = r.id WHERE r.is_admin_role = 1 AND r.id_company = #{id_company} AND r.is_delete = 0 AND r.`status` = 1 GROUP BY rm.id_screen
INSERT INTO role_screen_map ( id_role, id_screen, auths ) VALUES
#{id}, #{item.id_screen}, IF(#{item.id_screen} = 1, 511, 0)
INSERT INTO `role`( `name`, `parent`, `description`, `id_company`, `color` )VALUES( #{name}, #{parent}, #{description}, #{id_company}, #{color} );
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as id
========
>>>>>>>> origin/SolarEdgeAPI_master:target/nwm/mybatis/map/Role.xml SELECT r.*, r.id AS value, r.`name` as label, r.`name` as text, <<<<<<<< HEAD:src/main/resources/mybatis/map/AdminSettingRole.xml r.color, IF( COUNT(rm.id_role) = 0, JSON_ARRAY(), JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT( 'id', s.id, 'name', s.screen_name, 'auths', rm.auths, 'view', (IFNULL(rm.auths,0) & 1), 'new', (IFNULL(rm.auths,0) & 2), 'delete', (IFNULL(rm.auths,0) & 4), 'edit', (IFNULL(rm.auths,0) & 8), 'excel', (IFNULL(rm.auths,0) & 16), 'pdf', (IFNULL(rm.auths,0) & 32), 'print', (IFNULL(rm.auths,0) & 64), 'translate', (IFNULL(rm.auths,0) & 128), 'approval', (IFNULL(rm.auths,0) & 256) )) ) AS screens FROM `role` r LEFT JOIN role_screen_map rm ON r.id = rm.id_role LEFT JOIN screen s ON s.id = rm.id_screen WHERE r.id_company = #{id_company} AND r.status = 1 and r.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY r.id ======== c.`name` AS company_name FROM `role` r LEFT JOIN company c ON c.id = r.id_company
WHERE r.id_company = #{id_company}

INSERT INTO `role`( `name`, `parent`, `description`, `id_company`, `is_admin_role` )VALUES( #{name}, #{parent}, #{description}, #{id_company}, #{is_admin_role} );
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as id
>>>>>>>> origin/SolarEdgeAPI_master:target/nwm/mybatis/map/Role.xml
UPDATE `role` SET `name` = #{name}, <<<<<<<< HEAD:src/main/resources/mybatis/map/AdminSettingRole.xml description = #{description}, color = #{color} ======== `parent` = #{parent}, description = #{description}, `id_company` = #{id_company} >>>>>>>> origin/SolarEdgeAPI_master:target/nwm/mybatis/map/Role.xml WHERE `id` = #{id}
UPDATE `role` SET `is_delete` = #{is_delete} WHERE `id` = #{id}
<<<<<<<< HEAD:src/main/resources/mybatis/map/AdminSettingRole.xml
SELECT t.*, t.id AS value, t.name AS label, t.name AS text, 0 as is_checked FROM `role` t WHERE t.id_company = #{id_company} AND t.status = 1 and t.is_delete = 0;
========
SELECT s.id, s.has_child, s.id AS id_screen, s.screen_name, s.`level`, s.parent, s.path, s.link_demo, s.description, IF(rcs.auths > 1 && rcs.auths < 511, rcs.auths - 1 , rcs.auths) AS auths, rcs.id_role, 0 AS collapse, (IFNULL(rcs.auths,0) & 1) AS `view`, (IFNULL(rcs.auths,0) & 2) AS `new`, (IFNULL(rcs.auths,0) & 4) AS `delete`, (IFNULL(rcs.auths,0) & 8) AS `edit`, (IFNULL(rcs.auths,0) & 16) AS `excel`, (IFNULL(rcs.auths,0) & 32) AS `pdf`, (IFNULL(rcs.auths,0) & 64) AS `print`, (IFNULL(rcs.auths,0) & 128) AS `translate`, (IFNULL(rcs.auths,0) & 256) AS `approval` FROM screen s LEFT JOIN role_screen_map rcs ON rcs.id_screen = s.id WHERE s.`status` = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND rcs.id_role = #{id}
AND s.parent IS NULL
AND s.parent = #{id_screen}
ORDER BY s.`level` ASC
SELECT t.*, t.id AS value, t.name AS label, t.name AS text, 0 as is_checked, COUNT(er.id_employee) AS total_users, c.`name` AS company_name FROM `role` t LEFT JOIN company c ON c.id = t.id_company LEFT JOIN employee_role_map er ON er.id_role = t.id WHERE t.status = 1 AND t.is_delete = 0
AND t.id_company = #{id_company}
GROUP BY t.id
SELECT s.* FROM role r LEFT JOIN role_screen_map rm ON rm.id_role = r.id LEFT JOIN screen s ON s.id = rm.id_screen WHERE r.is_admin_role = 1 AND r.id_company = #{id_company} AND r.is_delete = 0 AND r.`status` = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND s.`status` = 1 GROUP BY rm.id_screen
SELECT s.* FROM role r LEFT JOIN role_screen_map rm ON rm.id_role = r.id LEFT JOIN screen s ON s.id = rm.id_screen WHERE r.id_company = #{id_company} AND r.is_delete = 0 AND r.`status` = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND s.`status` = 1 GROUP BY rm.id_screen
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalRecord FROM `role_screen_map` WHERE id_screen = #{id_screen} AND id_role = #{id_role};
UPDATE `role_screen_map` SET `auths` = #{auths} WHERE id_screen = #{id_screen} AND id_role = #{id_role}
UPDATE `screen` SET `screen_name` = #{screen_name}, `description` = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
DELETE FROM `role_screen_map` WHERE id_role = #{id_admin_role}
INSERT INTO `role_screen_map`( `id_role`, `id_screen`, `auths` )VALUES( #{id_role}, #{id_screen}, #{auths} );
SELECT t.* FROM `screen` t WHERE `status` = 1 AND is_delete = 0;
>>>>>>>> origin/SolarEdgeAPI_master:target/nwm/mybatis/map/Role.xml
SELECT * FROM role r WHERE r.id_company = #{id} AND r.is_admin_role = 0
SELECT rsm.*, s.screen_name FROM role_screen_map rsm LEFT JOIN screen s ON s.id = rsm.id_screen WHERE rsm.id_role = #{id}
DELETE FROM role_screen_map WHERE id_role IN
#{item.id_role}
DELETE FROM role_screen_map WHERE id_role IN
#{item.id_role}
INSERT INTO role_screen_map ( id_role, id_screen, auths) VALUES
#{element.id_role}, #{element.id_screen}, #{element.auths}
